programme.title: Bring It On: In It to Win It
programme.desc: A high-school senior (Ashley Benson) falls for a rival cheerleader (Michael Copon).

programme.title: Bring It On: Worldwide #Cheersmack
programme.desc: Destiny leads The Rebels in a virtual cheer competition after a rival team challenges them.

programme.title: Bring It On
programme.desc: Champion cheerleaders (Kirsten Dunst, Eliza Dushku, Jesse Bradford) compete against an urban squad.

programme.title: The Purge
programme.desc: In a future society, the government holds an annual 12-hour period during which all crime is legal.

programme.title: The Purge: Election Year
programme.desc: A senator and her head of security must survive an annual night of terror where all crime is legal.

programme.title: The First Purge
programme.desc: The first Purge commences as all crimes become legal for 12 hours in an isolated community.

programme.title: The Purge: Anarchy
programme.desc: Five strangers must band together to survive a night of government-sanctioned carnage.

programme.title: Ouija
programme.desc: Terror awaits five friends who unwittingly awaken a dark power by using an antique Ouija board.

programme.title: Ouija: Origin of Evil
programme.desc: A séance scam leads to terror when an evil spirit possesses a widow's youngest daughter.

programme.title: The Purge
programme.desc: In a future society, the government holds an annual 12-hour period during which all crime is legal.

programme.title: The Purge: Election Year
programme.desc: A senator and her head of security must survive an annual night of terror where all crime is legal.

programme.title: The First Purge
programme.desc: The first Purge commences as all crimes become legal for 12 hours in an isolated community.

programme.title: The Purge: Anarchy
programme.desc: Five strangers must band together to survive a night of government-sanctioned carnage.

programme.title: Ouija
programme.desc: Terror awaits five friends who unwittingly awaken a dark power by using an antique Ouija board.

programme.title: Ouija
programme.desc: Terror awaits five friends who unwittingly awaken a dark power by using an antique Ouija board.

programme.title: Ouija: Origin of Evil
programme.desc: A séance scam leads to terror when an evil spirit possesses a widow's youngest daughter.

programme.title: The Purge
programme.desc: In a future society, the government holds an annual 12-hour period during which all crime is legal.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: People (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) flee four big worms with multiple tongues.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: Handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.

programme.title: Tremors 3: Back to Perfection
programme.desc: Townspeople battle giant man-eating worms which burrow under the desert in Nevada.

programme.title: Tremors 4: The Legend Begins
programme.desc: A man (Michael Gross) hires a mercenary to destroy gigantic worms.

programme.title: Tremors 5: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Burt and Travis battle ass-blasters and graboids in South Africa.

programme.title: Tremors: A Cold Day in Hell
programme.desc: Burt Gummer must race against time to create an antidote from a giant worm's venom to save his life.
